name: Scotch Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar into a bowl.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in oats and currants.
4. Add milk; stir only until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Turn out onto a lightly floured board or canvas.
6. Knead gently for a few seconds.
7. Roll out to 1/4-inch thickness.
8. Cut with a floured diamond-shaped cutter.
9. Brush lightly with melted butter and sprinkle with sugar.
10. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake in a preheated hot oven (425°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
12. Serve piping hot.
